steps.title: Make one quadratic equation
steps.content:
Set the two expressions for $y$ equal to each other.
$$-0.5=x^2+10x+a$$
$$x^2+10x+a+0.5=0$$

steps.title: Require no real solutions
steps.content:
A quadratic has no real solutions when its discriminant is negative. Here $A=1$, $B=10$, and $C=a+0.5$.
$$B^2-4AC<0$$
$$10^2-4(1)(a+0.5)<0$$

steps.title: Find the least integer
steps.content: Now solve the inequality. $$100-4a-2<0$$ $$98-4a<0$$ $$98<4a$$ $$24.525.
